title: cissus thunbergii
intro: Cissus thunbergii, also known as the Bone Setter or Veldt Grape, is a type of flowering vine native to Africa and Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cissus thunbergii include its potential to aid in bone health, reduce pain and inflammation, and support cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of Cissus thunbergii are often found in capsule or tablet form and can be used to support joint health and bone density.
